title: SENTINEL APEX — CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog
id: 8075219f-ba3b-51ec-b5a0-91ff0b7747c2
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/04
modified: 2026/06/04
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-04T21:55:22Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CISA Adds One Known Exploited Vulnerability to Catalog Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8954181; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-04, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: Google Patches Actively Exploited Android Flaw Affecting Millions of Devices
items.description: Google fixed 124 Android flaws, including CVE-2025-48595, an actively exploited privilege escalation bug linked to targeted attacks. items.title: Why an HP Poly VoIP Phones Bug Could Become an Enterprise Foothold
items.description: Rapid7 details a critical unauthenticated overflow in HP Poly VoIP phones that can lead to root RCE, with patches available for affected models. It’s a critical unauthenticated stack-based buffer overflow that can give a remote […]

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-331 Pwn2Own Microsoft Edge Feedback Log File Handling Directory Traversal
id: bbd9249d-2485-5c7a-95e4-1b8c4c48f226
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to ZDI-26-331: (Pwn2Own) Microsoft Edge Feedback Log File Handling Directory Traversal Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/ZDI-26-331: (Pwn2Own) Microsoft Edge Feedback Log File Handling Directory Traversal Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/04
modified: 2026/06/04
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — ZDI-26-331: (Pwn2Own) Microsoft Edge Feedback Log File Handling Directory Traversal Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-04T21:55:22Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "ZDI-26-331: (Pwn2Own) Microsoft Edge Feedback Log File Handling Directory Traversal Remote Code Execution Vulnerability", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX ZDI-26-331: (Pwn2Own) Microsoft Edge Feedback Log File Handling Directory Traversal Remote Code Execution Vulnerability Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2246216; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-04, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-41237 - Froxlor has an incomplete fix for CVE-2026-30932

    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-41237 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC

modified: 2026/06/04

    product: generic

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-41237 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-04T21:55:22Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-41237", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
